title: ActionGate Decision
description: Serialized output of actiongate.Decision.to_dict(). Rate-limit evaluation result.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Consumers must check this before parsing.

reason.description: Block reason. Null when status is ALLOW.

message.description: Human-readable explanation. Null when status is ALLOW.

calls_in_window.description: Number of calls recorded in the current window.

time_since_last.description: Seconds since last call. Null if no prior calls.
